sessions.summary: Fixed globalThis property resolution for Window & typeof globalThis intersection types
sessions.invariant: When resolving properties on intersection types like Window & typeof globalThis, tsz should check properties from ALL intersection members (Window interface first), not just shortcut to globalThis property resolution

promising_leads: Other merged type property resolution issues may share similar patterns
Prototype assignment merge issues (chainedPrototypeAssignment.ts) may need separate solver-level fix
